cards.title: hook, retain, reward
cards.content:
> A content unit has three components - hook, retain, and reward. 

[...]

> All audience-growing content does one thing - it rewards the people consuming it. And a person can only get rewarded by the content if they:   1) Have a reason to consume it and   2) Pay attention long enough to   3) Get that reason satisfied. 

— 📖 $100M Leads

cards.title: Mark Lou n days of x strategy
cards.content:
1. pick a skill
2. brand profile around it
3. everyday, post "day i of n of learning skill. I made..."
4. engage with related accounts

cards.title: ~ share a 5 minute story every day
~ curating content for an audience makes you more conscious about what you consume
